node.title: Basic React Chat Application - Uber Frontend

topic.title: Basic React Chat Application - Uber Frontend

post.content:
Create a React component that implements a basic chat interface with the following requirements:
Can also practise question on **PrepareFrontend** - https://preparefrontend.com/react-practise?id=5&title=Basic-React-Chat-Application

![image](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/b39706c9-ec4a-4f19-b027-5a00024c8d11_1737896718.0525053.png)

1. Develop an input box for typing messages
2. Create a send button to submit messages
3. Design a message container to display chat history
4. Implement state management for:
   - Tracking input text
   - Storing and displaying message list
5. Ensure messages are added to chat history when sent
6. Clear input box after message submission
This seems to be a platform marketing post :)\n
